'''Arali Dil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] student at [[Garqi Agricultural University]] and friend of [[Dynba Tesc]]. She was one of many students who were disgruntled with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and began [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]] into their mainframe on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. She, along with Dynba and [[Sihha]], [[Great Evacuation|escaped]] Garqi onboard the ''[[Star's Delight]]'' thanks to the help of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].
